response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced senior full-stack developer with strong expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but he critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows required for this role. Additionally, his background lacks the necessary deep domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking, making him fundamentally misaligned with the core requirements of this specific position.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience with strong modern engineering practices like TDD and CI/CD.
Demonstrated fintech exposure through his work at RIDE Capital.
Excellent communication and leadership skills shown by speaking at conferences and organizing workshops.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience, showing only a brief 6-month stint in 2014-2015.
Missing required Windows platform C++ experience, as most of his low-level work was in DLang or on Linux.
Lacks the required enterprise database experience with SQL Server or Oracle, focusing heavily on NoSQL and MySQL.
